title: biscutella neustriaca
intro: Biscutella neustriaca, also known as the Neustrian biscutella, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Biscutella neustriaca can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its health benefits.
